calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Bassi for and with Gina Hughes.

Mr. Bassi addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes, and explained circumstances and services provided to support extraordinary fees. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Continued To Jul-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Continued To Jun-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Bassi, for and with Gina Hughes-Lemus (Administrator).

Mr. Bassi stated that his client had given him the tax return last week, that it was sent to the paralegal to add to the accounting which is done, that he had someone in his office review it, that they noticed some problems with it, and that it was sent back for the corrections. At the conclusion of Mr. Bassi's comments, the Court continued the matter to April 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that a either a petition for final distribution or a new petition to approve/extend status on administration will be on file before that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.
